parts.text: [TARGET_DIR: /Users/ddphuong/Projects/epost-workspace/a11y-agent/frontend] Audit this React TypeScript web app for WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance. Focus on color contrast, keyboard navigation, and ARIA labeling.
[TARGET_DIR: /tmp/sample-ios-app] Audit this iOS Swift app for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. I'm most concerned about VoiceOver support and Dynamic Type scaling.
[TARGET_DIR: /tmp/sample-android-app] Run a WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility audit on this Android Kotlin app with Jetpack Compose. Focus on TalkBack support and touch target sizes.
What platforms and WCAG 2.1 criteria do you support for accessibility audits? How does the audit process work?
